title: lonchocarpus fluvialis
intro: Lonchocarpus fluvialis is a plant species of the Lonchocarpus genus, commonly known as the river pea tree or yellow peaberries. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus fluvialis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Lonchocarpus fluvialis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
